description.value:
Forge World

Forge worlds are the domain of the Adeptus Mechanicus, vast planets given over entirely to industry and manufacture. Those born on forge worlds grow up surrounded by technology and the dogma of the Machine God. They possess a natural affinity for machines and an intellectual rigour instilled by the Cult Mechanicus, though their upbringing often leaves them socially awkward and uncomfortable with the messy realities of human interaction.

Homeworld Bonus

+Intelligence, +Toughness, –Fellowship

Homeworld Aptitude

Intelligence

Wounds

8+1d5

Fate Threshold

3 (Emperor's Blessing 8+)

Starting Skills

Tech-Use or Common Lore (Machine Cult)

Starting Talent

Choose one: Weapon Training (choice)

Homeworld Trait

Omnissiah's Chosen: A forge world character starts with either the Technical Knock or Weapon-Tech Talent. Additionally, they gain a +10 bonus to any Test to locate, acquire, or interact with technology.

specialAbilities.name: Omnissiah's Chosen
specialAbilities.description: A forge world character starts with either the Technical Knock or Weapon-Tech Talent. Additionally, they gain a +10 bonus to any Test to locate, acquire, or interact with technology.

system.notes: Emperor's Blessing: On a roll of 8+ on 1d10, the character begins with an extra Fate Point.
